description_long: This house features a rectangular footprint with a flat roof and a combination of white and beige exterior walls. The front facade is adorned with tall, narrow windows framed by decorative moldings, and small balconies beneath some windows. The main entryway is recessed, marked by a prominent door and a small set of steps. The structure includes multiple rooms visible from above, with interior partitions and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The roofline is flat with subtle parapet details, and the overall design suggests a blend of classical and modern influences.
description: A beige and white rectangular house with tall windows, small balconies, and a flat roof, featuring a prominent recessed entryway.
description_view_0: This view shows the rear side of the house with a plain white wall and a single recessed entry door.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the beige wall, a set of steps leading to a door, and small balconies with railings.
description_view_2: The front facade is visible here, featuring tall windows with decorative moldings, small balconies, and the main entryway.
description_view_3: This view displays the opposite side of the house, showing a large open area and the continuation of the flat roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with steps, framed by a small overhang and decorative moldings
